channel.title: 景報 Jae Daily · 2026年03月16日
channel.description: 国际政治 · 宏观财经 · 前沿科技 · AI 辅助分析

item.title: AI军事化与五角大楼围剿

item.title: 加拿大养老基金遭私募寒冬
item.description: Rising interest rates bring prolonged downturn to the buyout industry

item.title: 乌克兰打响金融前线保卫战
item.description: The war-torn country is battling to secure crucial funding from the IMF and EU, as well as putting up taxes.

item.title: 缅甸军政府议会政变后首开
item.description: Five years after armoured vehicles rolled through the streets of Myanmar’s capital and the generals tore up an election result they did not like, a new parliament sat for the first time on Monday. The

item.title: 斯塔默将出台取暖油费用支持计划
item.description: Households have faced a sharp rise in the cost of heating oil since the outbreak of the US-Israeli war with Iran.

item.title: 裕信350亿欧元竞购商银
item.description: UniCredit SpA made a €35 billion ($40 billion) bid for Commerzbank AG that will allow it to increase its shareholding beyond 30%, easing the path for a potential future acquisition.

item.title: 钢厂日耗130万英镑运营
item.description: The government spent £377m to keep British Steel's Scunthorpe site operating, according to a report.

item.title: 英国清洁能源目标进展艰难
item.description: Our economy remains highly fossil fuel-dependent partly because we are not electrifying in the desired way

item.title: 内塔尼亚胡对手竞相对伊强硬
item.description: Israel’s opposition parties criticise PM’s management of war even if they express strong support for offensive

item.title: 美股期货随油价上涨 美元走低
item.description: Stocks edged higher and the dollar slipped as traders focused on any signs the Strait of Hormuz will reopen as well as a slew of central bank meetings this week.

item.title: 津巴布韦一煤矿运营许可被吊销
item.description: RioZim Ltd., a former unit of Rio Tinto Group, lost its operating license in Zimbabwe after the miner failed to develop a 2,800 megawatt coal-fired power plant.

item.title: 安湃福26亿美元收购GN助听业务
item.description: Amplifon SpA agreed to buy the hearing-aid business of GN Store Nord A/S in a deal valued at 17 billion Danish kroner ($2.6 billion), a price that sent shares of the seller soaring the most on record.

item.title: 剑桥校长促改革学生贷款制度
item.description: Chris Smith criticises ‘absurd position’ graduates find themselves in and calls for more vocational education

item.title: 散户撤离私募信贷金矿
item.description: Flood of redemptions threatens to stall one of Wall Street’s most important sources of growth

item.title: 企业雇青年失业者可获补贴
item.description: Payments of £3,000 for each 18-24 year old given a job are among proposals to tackle youth unemployment being announced later.

item.title: 韩美联演，大将督战备战
item.description: SEOUL, March 16 (Yonhap) -- South Korea's top general on Monday visited the Army...

item.title: 泰勒-福斯特谈香港悖论之美
item.description: With his peroxide blond hair, dark moustache and luxuriant eyebrows, London-born curator and writer James Taylor-Foster is easy to pick out among the tourists and selfie-takers in the courtyard of Yic

item.title: 美团体驱动英国新一代反堕胎运动
item.description: The killing of Charlie Kirk galvanised a transatlantic campaign against abortion. But will it succeed in shifting Britain's pro-choice consensus?

item.title: 供应链攻击潜袭GitHub仓库
item.description: Unicode that's invisible to the human eye was largely abandoned—until attackers took notice.

item.title: 乌干达反对派领袖称逃亡保命
item.description: Bobi Wine says from an undisclosed location: "It was clear that the regime wanted to eliminate me."

item.title: 以军称密歇根犹太教堂袭击者之兄系真主党指挥官
item.description: US officials previously said the man accused of ramming a truck full of explosives into a synagogue had recently lost family in Lebanon.

item.title: Triton Partners旗舰基金募资55亿欧元
item.description: Triton Partners has raised €5.5 billion ($6.3 billion) for its new flagship fund, an important milestone after the buyout firm’s ability to attract fresh money was marred by work culture controversies

item.title: 纸币、河狸与英国抵制潮
item.description: Politicians are furious Churchill will be replaced on banknotes. The RSPCA wants rats and pigeons to feature.

item.title: AI游戏盲区解密
item.description: When winning depends on intuiting a mathematical function, AIs come up short.

item.title: 新“非洲争夺战”恐陷分而治之
item.description: The disunity persists despite Africa’s enormous advantages, including a rapidly growing consumer market and dominant control of critical minerals essential to the global economy.

item.title: 俄军罕见日间袭击震撼基辅
item.description: Russia launched a rare daytime attack on Kyiv Monday, with AFP journalists reporting air defence batteries shooting down a barrage of projectiles. Authorities said that the attack has so far caused no

item.title: 肖恩·潘弃奥斯卡赴乌克兰访问
item.description: The actor, who did not attend the ceremony to receive his award for best supporting actor for his role in ‘One Battle After Another,’ instead decided to travel to Europe, according to The New York Tim

item.title: 奥斯卡得主疾呼停止战争
item.description: Oscar winner Pavel Talankin called for ‘an end to all wars’ as he received the best documentary award.

item.title: 以军西岸杀害四口之家
item.description: Israeli soldiers killed two children along with their mother and father on Sunday after they opened fire on a car carrying a family of six in the occupied West Bank. One of their two surviving childre
